memoryArtifacts.description: Clementia, to whom her father gave in free marriage the manor of Mollington Banastre, in Cheshire. She married William Lea, and died after 8 Feb 1299, leaving a son and daughter. The son was Sir Henr …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Clemence de Banastre於大約1240年出生在英國爾莫利頓時，她的父親Robert de Banastre IV25歲，母親Clemence de Orreby20歲。她於1260年與Sir William De Lea Baron of Kendall在英國英格蘭爾莫利頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1298年在英國英格蘭爾莫利頓享年60歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.Lea Hall, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾麗婭 霍爾
zh-hans.Hill, Gloucestershire, England: 英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾希爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Clemence de Banastre于大约1240年出生在英国爾莫利頓时，她的父亲Robert de Banastre IV25岁，母亲Clemence de Orreby20岁。她于1260年与Sir William De Lea Baron of Kendall在英国英格兰爾莫利頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1298年在英国英格兰爾莫利頓享年60岁，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clemence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval French and English form of Latin Clementia, a derivative of Clemens ( see Clement ) or an abstract noun meaning ‘mercy’. It was fairly popular in Britain from the late medieval period until the 17th century, but has since been used less often.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Clemence de Banastre was born about 1240, in Mollington, Cheshire, England, her father, Robert de Banastre IV, was 25 and her mother, Clemence de Orreby, was 20. She married Sir William De Lea Baron of Kendall in 1260, in Mollington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died about 1298, in Mollington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Clemence de Banastre est née environ 1240, à Mollington, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Banastre IV, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Clemence de Orreby, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William De Lea Baron of Kendall en 1260, à Mollington, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1298, à Mollington, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Clemence de Banastre um 1240 in Mollington, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Banastre IV 25 und ihre Mutter Clemence de Orreby 20. Sie hat 1260 in Mollington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Sir William De Lea Baron of Kendall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb um 1298 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Mollington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Clemence de Banastre è nata il circa 1240 nel Mollington, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Robert de Banastre IV, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Clemence de Orreby, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Sir William De Lea Baron of Kendall nel 1260, nel Mollington, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì circa 1298, nel Mollington, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Clemence de Banastreが約1240年にイギリスチェシュアイアモリントンで生まれた時，父Robert de Banastre IVは25歳，母Clemence de Orrebyは20歳であった。1260年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアモリントンでSir William De Lea Baron of Kendallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1298年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアモリントンで60歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Clemence de Banastre(이)가 대략 1240년 영국 체실르 모링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Banastre IV(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Clemence de Orreby(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1260년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 모링턴에서 Sir William De Lea Baron of Kendall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1298년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 모링턴에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Clemence de Banastre nasceu aproximadamente 1240, em Mollington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Banastre IV, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Clemence de Orreby, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William De Lea Baron of Kendall em 1260, em Mollington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1298, em Mollington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Clemence de Banastre родилась около 1240 г. в местности моллингтон, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Banastre IV было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Clemence de Orreby, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William De Lea Baron of Kendall в 1260 г. в местности моллингтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла около 1298 г. в местности моллингтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия, Великобритания.

sm.about 1240–about 1298: e tusa o le 1240–e tusa o le 1298

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Clemence de Banastre nació aproximadamente 1240, en Mollington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Banastre IV, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Clemence de Orreby, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Sir William De Lea Baron of Kendall en 1260, en Mollington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1298, en Mollington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
